name: @domain-slayer/workspace
description: Inventario de sitios web, SSL, dominios y documentación

scripts.dev: node node_modules/concurrently/dist/bin/concurrently.js -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build:all && npm run build --prefix apps/frontend
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --prefix packages/shared && npm run build --prefix packages/domain && npm run build --prefix packages/application && npm run build --prefix packages/infrastructure
scripts.build:services: npm run build --prefix services/inventory.service && npm run build --prefix services/document.service && npm run build --prefix services/alerting.service && npm run build --prefix services/monitoring.service
scripts.build:all: npm run build:packages && npm run build:services && npm run build --prefix apps/backend
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('Sin lint agregado en paquetes; usa ESLint por app si lo necesitas.')"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/domain packages/application packages/infrastructure apps/backend
